summary: Comprehensive testing of Size Guide modal and Wallet integration features. All 11 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly including Size Guide modal with garments/sneakers sizing tables and Apple/Google Wallet buttons on success page.

issues: Minor React hydration warning in console about <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warning in SizeGuideModal table rendering - consider using React.Fragment instead of map wrapper for table rows
test_credentials: Test phones: 9876543230-9876543240 (new test subscribers for wallet tests). Sandbox OTP auto-returned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Size Guide modal and Wallet integration features fully implemented and tested. Size Guide button visible in preferences step with data-testid='open-size-guide'. Modal shows garments (XS-XXL) and sneakers (UK6-UK12) sizing tables. Apple/Google Wallet buttons visible on success page with data-testid='add-apple-wallet' and 'add-google-wallet'. Wallet APIs return 'not configured' message with requirements list since certificates are not set up.

size_guide_modal.modal_opens_on_click: PASS - Modal opens with close button
size_guide_modal.garments_section_XS_to_XXL: PASS - Shows XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL with chest/length measurements
size_guide_modal.sneakers_section_UK6_to_UK12: PASS - Shows UK6-UK12 with EU/US/CM conversions
size_guide_modal.pro_tips_section: PASS - Shows sizing tips for Indian streetwear

wallet_integration.wallet_buttons_show_info_toast: PASS - Shows 'requires certificates/Google Cloud setup' message

full_subscription_flow.step_1_verify: PASS - Phone input, send OTP, verify OTP
full_subscription_flow.step_2_details: PASS - Name input, proceed to payment
full_subscription_flow.step_4_preferences: PASS - Size Guide button, categories, sizes, brands selection
full_subscription_flow.step_5_success: PASS - Membership card, wallet buttons, summary display

mocked_apis.twilio_whatsapp: SANDBOX mode - logs messages, doesn't actually send
mocked_apis.apple_wallet: NOT CONFIGURED - returns info message about Apple Developer certificates required
mocked_apis.google_wallet: NOT CONFIGURED - returns info message about Google Cloud setup required

wallet_apple_response.message: Apple Wallet integration requires Apple Developer certificates. Contact support to enable this feature.

wallet_google_response.message: Google Wallet integration requires Google Cloud setup. Contact support to enable this feature.
